title: 6 Best Transportation Stocks To Buy Right Now: FedEx, UPS And More
text: Airlines and cruise line stocks have had an extremely volatile couple of years since the pandemic completely shut down global travel back in 2020. Travel industries still haven't recovered to their pre-pandemic levels.

title: CSX Corp. Recommends Shareholders Reject “Mini-Tender” Offer by TRC Capital Investment Corporation
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., March 23, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) (“CSX”) announced today that it received notice of an unsolicited “mini-tender” offer by TRC Capital Investment Corporation (“TRC”) to purchase up to four million shares of CSX common stock at a price of $34.75 per share in cash. The offer price is 4.43% below the $36.34 closing price of CSX common stock on March 18, 2022 the last trading day before the mini-tender commenced.

title: CSX Announces Date for First Quarter Earnings Release and Earnings Call
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., March 23, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) will release first quarter financial and operating results after the market close on Wednesday, April 20, 2022. This will be followed by a conference call and live webcast hosted by the company's management team at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time.

title: CSX Chief Executive Officer To Address JP Morgan Industrials Conference
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., March 09, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) President and Chief Executive Officer, James M. Foote, will address the 2022 JP Morgan Industrials Conference in New York on Wednesday, March 16 at 8:00 am Eastern time.
